items.title: Caterpillar (CAT) Finds a New Growth Engine in Data Center Power Demand
items.description: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is included among the 20 Best Performing Dividend Stocks in 2025. Power-hungry AI projects have turned into a clear tailwind for Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT). The company sells engines and generators to a wide range of customers, and that side of the business is getting more attention. For decades, Caterpillar built much of […]
